legal.schedule: Monday to Sunday, 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM (Mexico City time)
legal.cancellationDescription: Information about cancellations, changes, and refunds
legal.privacyDescription: How we protect your personal data and privacy
legal.termsDescription: Terms of use for our hot air balloon flight services

cancellation.introText: This Cancellation Policy outlines the terms...
cancellation.customerIntro: If you need to cancel your reservation:
cancellation.refund24: Less than 24 hours in advance: No refund...
cancellation.customerNote: All cancellations must be requested in writing...

privacy.introText: At Flying Pictures México, we are committed to protecting your privacy...
privacy.dataIntro: We may collect the following types of information:
privacy.healthInfo: Health information: Weight, relevant medical conditions...
privacy.photosVideos: Photos and videos: Images taken during your flight...
privacy.usageIntro: We use your information for the following purposes:
privacy.useProcess: To process and manage your flight reservations
privacy.useCommunicate: To communicate with you regarding confirmations...
privacy.useSafety: To ensure your safety during the flight experience
privacy.useImprove: To improve our services and user experience
privacy.useLegal: To comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.useMarketing: To send promotional communications (with your consent)
privacy.usePayment: To process payments and prevent fraud
privacy.protectionText: We implement technical, administrative, and physical security measures...
privacy.cookiesText: Our website uses cookies and similar technologies...
privacy.sharingIntro: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share your data with:
privacy.rightsIntro: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
privacy.rightDelete: Request deletion of your personal data
privacy.rightObject: Object to or restrict data processing
privacy.rightWithdraw: Withdraw your consent at any time
privacy.retentionText: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary...
privacy.minorsText: Our services are not intended for minors...
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically...

terms.servicesIntro: Flying Pictures México offers hot air balloon flight experiences...
terms.serviceExtras: Additional services such as transportation and breakfast
terms.bookingIntro: To book a flight, you must:
terms.booking1: Provide accurate and up-to-date personal information...
terms.bookingNote: Reservation confirmation is subject to availability...
